message:
feat(dcg): implement pending exceptions service for allow-once workflow

Add complete implementation of DCG pending exceptions, enabling users
to bypass false positives through a controlled single-execution approval
process without permanently allowlisting dangerous patterns.

## New Service: dcg-pending.service.ts (508 lines)

Core functionality:
- createPendingException(): Generate short codes for blocked commands
- getPendingException(): Retrieve by ID or short code
- listPendingExceptions(): Filter by status, agent, with pagination
- approvePendingException(): Approve for single execution with audit
- denyPendingException(): Deny with reason and audit trail
- validateExceptionForExecution(): Verify approved exceptions before use
- markAsExecuted(): Record execution result
- cleanupExpiredExceptions(): Prune expired entries

Short code generation:
- 6-character alphanumeric codes (e.g., "abc123")
- Collision-resistant with retry logic
- Human-friendly format for CLI/UI input

Security features:
- SHA256 command hashing for tamper detection
- Status-based state machine (pending→approved→executed)
- TTL-based automatic expiration
- Audit trail for all state transitions

WebSocket integration:
- Real-time notifications on exception status changes
- Broadcasts to dcg:pending channel

## Route Updates: dcg.ts

Added validation schemas:
- PendingQuerySchema: Filter and pagination for list endpoint
- DenyRequestSchema: Optional denial reason
- ValidateRequestSchema: Command hash verification

Added service imports for all pending exception operations.

This implements the service layer for bead flywheel_gateway-5sq
(DCG: Implement Pending Exceptions).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
